You are running as a single automated phase of the ADW pipeline.
The orchestrator performs ALL git and GitHub work for this run: do NOT run git or gh, do NOT create/switch/commit/push branches, and do NOT open, merge, or comment on pull requests. If the task section below tells you to do any of that, skip those steps.
You have no GitHub access in this phase; all issue context you need is provided inline.

---

Classify work item #2 into a single change type for branch naming and commit prefixing.

Work item context (title, body, labels):

2 GitHub issue #2: ci: add single `verify` quality-gate script
Labels: issue_class:ci adw-live-batch

Part of the MVP live-run batch (`adw_sdlc/docs/LIVE-RUN-BATCH.md`). Intended `issue_class`: **ci**. Planned ADW run mode: native.

## Goal
Provide a single `npm run verify` quality gate so the ADW test gate can use `ADW_TEST_CMD="npm run verify"`. The ADW gate is shell-split and run via `spawnSync` (no shell), so a chained `a && b` test command does not work — one command is required.

## Scope
- Ensure `adw_sdlc/package.json` has a `verify` script chaining: `typecheck → lint:env → pack:check → test → build → rm -rf dist`.
- Document it in `README.md` (development section).

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `npm run verify` runs all gates and exits non-zero if any fails.
- [ ] `dist/` is removed at the end (no build artifact left behind).
- [ ] README mentions `verify` as the canonical local/CI gate.

## Notes
A draft `verify` script may already be present from planning; this issue ratifies and documents it.

## Instructions

- Choose exactly one `issue_class` from: `feat`, `fix`, `docs`, `chore`, `ci`, `test`, `refactor`.
  - `feat` — new user-visible feature or capability.
  - `fix` — bug fix or correctness change.
  - `docs` — documentation-only change.
  - `chore` — maintenance, deps, tooling with no user-visible behavior change.
  - `ci` — CI/build/workflow change.
  - `test` — test-only change.
  - `refactor` — internal restructuring with no behavior change.
- Prefer the narrowest truthful classification.
- If labels and body disagree, classify by the actual requested change.
